search_playbook.route: Start with cosmetics source cards, then term cards for PIF, notification, registration categories, and specific-purpose cosmetics transition.
Search food additives and ingredient query sources before treating a common name as permitted.
Use food labeling/allergen coverage first; ask for finished-product category and ingredient source when alias context is ambiguous.
Use customs and food import source cards; keep classification, importer registration, and labeling as separate checks.
Normalize via term aliases but confirm category and jurisdiction before final ranking when the alias review queue flags a collision.
